freeStart.title: Build your first claim pack before you escalate.
freeStart.subtitle: Choose your lane, answer a short guided intake, and leave with a structured Free Start pack shell you can carry into membership or follow-up support.

choose.heading: Start with the issue you need to solve.
choose.body: This public intake stays on the claims already in launch scope. Pick the lane that matches your situation first.

vehicle.title: Vehicle damage
vehicle.description: Traffic accidents, theft, vandalism, and insurer delay on repairs or payout.

property.title: Property damage
property.description: Home, apartment, or building damage with a clear recovery path.

injury.title: Personal injury
injury.description: Injury matters with a monetary recovery path and a clear responsible party.

details.heading: Answer the guided intake.
details.body: We only need the core facts for the first pack shell: what happened, when it happened, who is involved, and what you want to recover.
details.counterpartyPlaceholder: Insurer, landlord, employer, hospital, driver, or other party
details.desiredOutcome: What do you want to recover?
details.summaryPlaceholder: Add the core facts you would want repeated consistently in a complaint, notice, or follow-up call.

preview.heading: Review your Free Start pack shell.
preview.body: This shell keeps the intake facts together before deeper guidance, evidence prompts, or staff escalation.

includes.summary: A structured intake summary you can reuse without rewriting the facts.
includes.timeline: A clean timeline anchor with the date, issue type, and responsible party.
includes.handoff: A consistent handoff point for membership, hotline follow-up, or later escalation.

completion.heading: Your intake is complete.
completion.body: You now have a structured claim-pack shell based on the facts you entered. Continue when you want formal follow-up or membership handling.

high.label: High
high.body: Your intake shows a clear recovery path with a defined counterparty and a concrete outcome.

medium.label: Medium
medium.body: Your intake is usable, but the facts suggest document review before you escalate.

low.label: Low
low.body: Your intake looks closer to guidance-only follow-up or early routing support than a clear recovery path.

levels.high: Join Asistenca for human triage within 24 business hours.
levels.medium: Upgrade for document review before you send the first complaint or notice.
levels.low: Use the hotline for routing support and the clearest next step before you escalate.

member.high: Continue in member claims for review
member.medium: Continue in member claims and request review

portal.high: Continue in the portal for review
portal.medium: Continue in the portal and request review

hotline.low: Call the hotline for next-step guidance

support.heading: Keep the first step clean and consistent.
support.body: The shell is designed to keep your first public intake short, repeatable, and ready for the next trust surfaces without reopening the facts.

points.lane: You choose the right commercial lane first: vehicle, property, or injury.
points.facts: The intake captures only the core facts needed to move forward clearly.
points.handoff: The same facts can flow into membership or follow-up without a routing change.

validation.chooseCategory: Choose vehicle, property, or injury before continuing.
validation.completeIntake: Complete each guided intake field before previewing your Free Start pack.
